question: For the illustrative data, we have established $ ar{x}=603.64,  ar{y}=20.55, s_X=378.451, s_Y=11.725$ and $r=0.737$.
answer:
The slope coefficient $b=r  rac{s_Y}{s_X}=0.737 \cdot  rac{11.725}{378.451}=0.02284$.
The intercept coefficient $a= ar{y}-b  ar{x}=20.55-(0.02284)(603.64)=6.76$.
The regression model is $\hat{y}=6.76+0.0228 x$.
